issues.root_cause: PDF has no usable text layer or extracted text is too short.
issues.downstream_impact: AI/RAG coverage, chunk quality, and search recall.
issues.suggested_fix: Run OCR queue for flagged PDFs.

issues.root_cause: Manifest/table fields are blank in raw support files.
issues.suggested_fix: Review manifest rows and fill key source/category fields.

issues.root_cause: Some public pages appear decoded with the wrong character set.
issues.suggested_fix: Re-fetch or re-decode affected HTML/TXT pages.

issues.root_cause: HTML page has little main body after removing nav/script/footer.
issues.suggested_fix: Review whether these pages are true content or navigation pages.
